# Sandur Productions — Full Documentation

> Comprehensive AI-readable documentation for Sandur Productions, including site structure, detailed project information, and organizational context.

## Organizational Overview

Sandur Productions is an independent student-led production house founded by Amogha Raj Sandur in 2026. Part of the Sandur Group Ventures ecosystem, it focuses on high-quality cinematic storytelling, including web series, short films, and documentaries.

### Core Mission
To tell stories that matter. We believe in the power of cinema to illuminate truth, challenge perspectives, and create lasting emotional impact.

### Brand Identity
- **Name:** Sandur Productions
- **Founder:** Amogha Raj Sandur
- **Based In:** India
- **Parent Organization:** Sandur Group Ventures
- **Technology Partner:** SandurTech (Sandur Technologies)

---

## Website Structure & Localization

The website uses a locale-prefixed routing system (`/[locale]/`) and supports three languages:
- **English (en):** Primary language and default fallback.
- **Hindi (hi):** Full localization for Hindi-speaking audiences.
- **Kannada (kn):** Full localization for Kannada-speaking audiences.

### Sitemap & Routes

| Page | URL Pattern | Description |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| **Home** | `/[locale]/` | Landing page featuring the cinematic hero, recent works, and core mission. |
| **About** | `/[locale]/about` | Detailed information about the production house, its history, and founder. |
| **Projects** | `/[locale]/projects` | A showcase of all productions with filtering and search capabilities. |
| **Blog** | `/[locale]/blog` | Behind-the-scenes content, updates, and cinematic insights (Coming Soon). |
| **Privacy Policy** | `/[locale]/privacy` | Comprehensive data protection and privacy policy. |
| **Cookie Policy** | `/[locale]/cookie-policy` | Detailed explanation of cookie usage and user consent management. |
| **Terms of Use** | `/[locale]/terms` | Legal terms and conditions for using the website. |
| **GDPR** | `/[locale]/gdpr` | Information regarding General Data Protection Regulation compliance. |

---

## Detailed Project Catalog

### 1. THE SCAM (Finance Web Series)
- **Status:** In Production
- **Category:** Web Series
- **Year:** 2026
- **Genre:** Finance / Drama
- **Description:** A gripping finance web series exploring the world of financial fraud and deception. It dives deep into the high-stakes world of finance where the line between ambition and crime is razor-thin.
- **Crew:** Directed by Amogha Raj Sandur.

### 2. UTTARA (Short Film)
- **Status:** Released
- **Category:** Short Film
- **Year:** 2026
- **Genre:** Drama / Short Film
- **Description:** A compelling and emotionally resonant short film that showcases the signature cinematic style of Sandur Productions.
- **Crew:** Directed by Amogha Raj Sandur.

---

## Legal & Compliance

### GDPR & Privacy
Sandur Productions operates on a **default-denied** privacy architecture. No non-essential cookies (Analytics or Marketing) are loaded until the user provides explicit consent via the Cookie Consent Banner or Preferences Modal.
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity (consent-gated).
- **Control:** Users can revoke or change their consent at any time through the localized "Privacy Preferences" accessible in the site navigation.

### Accessibility
The site is built with a focus on accessibility, including:
- **Skip Links:** For keyboard navigation efficiency.
- **High Contrast Support:** Theme-aware high-contrast mode for users with visual impairments.
- **Screen Reader Optimization:** Using semantic HTML and the `inert` attribute for managing focus in off-screen menus.

---

## External Presence

### Social Channels
- **YouTube:** [Sandur Productions Official](https://www.youtube.com/@SandurProductions) — Official trailer and project releases.
- **LinkedIn:** [Sandur Productions Company Page](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sandur-productions/) — Professional updates and industry connections.
- **Instagram:** [@sandur_productions](https://www.instagram.com/sandur_productions/) — Visual updates and behind-the-scenes content.
- **Threads:** [@sandur_productions](https://www.threads.net/@sandur_productions) — Quick updates and engagement.

### Founder & Tech
- **Amogha Raj Sandur (Founder):** [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/amogharajsandur/)
- **SandurTech (Developer):** [Official Website](https://sandurtech.vercel.app)

---

## Technical Stack

- **Framework:** React 19 (Vite 8)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Routing:** TanStack Router
- **Styling:** SCSS (7-1 Pattern) with Theme Support
- **Internationalization:** react-i18next (Locale-prefixed paths)
- **Deployment:** Vercel (https://sandurproductions.vercel.app)

---

## Metadata

- **Last Updated:** 2026-03-30
- **Version:** 2.0.0 (Multi-Page / i18n / GDPR)
- **Canonical URL:** https://sandurproductions.vercel.app
